title: New IMLAB website draft started

title: NYCU ORCA AUV team reaches SAUVC 2026 finals
summary: CNA reported that the NYCU ORCA AUV student team, co-advised by Prof. Chia-Hung Tsai, advanced to the finals of the Singapore AUV Challenge and validated autonomous underwater navigation and sensing integration.

title: Microcapsule project period completed
summary: Public NYCU profile lists recent projects on controllable microcapsules toward artificial red blood cells.
